# Calculator Content Contract

This file is auto-generated by `npm run calc:contract:sync`.
Do not edit manually.

- relatedGuides
- relatedToolsTitle
- subtitle
- title

## Update Workflow

1. Change calculator copy keys in source content files.
2. Run `npm run calc:contract:sync`.
3. Commit both source changes and this contract file together.
